'''lajuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjacency|coadjacency]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjacency|coadjacency]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lajuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læjichith|læjichith]] || [[word:læjichij|læjichij]] || [[word:læjichish|læjichish]] || [[word:læjichi|læjichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lajujuchuth|lajujuchuth]] || [[word:lajujuchuj|lajujuchuj]] || [[word:lajujuchush|lajujuchush]] || [[word:lajujuchu|lajujuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lajuchuth|lajuchuth]] || [[word:lajuchuj|lajuchuj]] || [[word:lajuchush|lajuchush]] || [[word:lajuchu|lajuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lajufchuth|lajufchuth]] || [[word:lajufchuj|lajufchuj]] || [[word:lajufchush|lajufchush]] || [[word:lajufchuf|lajufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lajuchuthu|lajuchuthu]] || [[word:lajuchuju|lajuchuju]] || [[word:lajuchushu|lajuchushu]] || [[word:lajuchuku|lajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lajuchuth|lajuchuth]] || [[word:lajuchuj|lajuchuj]] || [[word:lajuchush|lajuchush]] || [[word:lajuchu|lajuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lajuchuthul|lajuchuthul]] || [[word:lajuchujul|lajuchujul]] || [[word:lajuchushul|lajuchushul]] || [[word:lajuchukul|lajuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lajuchuthuthu|lajuchuthuthu]] || [[word:lajuchujuju|lajuchujuju]] || [[word:lajuchushushu|lajuchushushu]] || [[word:lajuchuku|lajuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lajuchuthun|lajuchuthun]] || [[word:lajuchujun|lajuchujun]] || [[word:lajuchushun|lajuchushun]] || [[word:lajuchukun|lajuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lajuchuthuoro|lajuchuthuoro]] || [[word:lajuchujuoro|lajuchujuoro]] || [[word:lajuchushuoro|lajuchushuoro]] || [[word:lajuchukuoro|lajuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
